## Change Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor or maintenance

## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Related Issue

Fixes #

## Testing

- [ ] Tested locally
- [ ] Added screenshots for UI changes when relevant
- [ ] Included notes for anything not fully tested

## Review Notes

Call out any context, tradeoffs, or areas where you want focused review.
